title: Teloc Hunters
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:IAmAGenerousGod-CotG.jpg|thumb|right|200px|A member of the Teloc Hunters.]]
The '''Teloc Hunters''' were a famous group from [[Teloc Ol-sen]],<ref name="CoG">''[[Creatures of the Galaxy]]'', 14.</ref> a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Eclorar sector/Legends|Eclorar sector]].<ref name="Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion">{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}}</ref> Historically, they rode the [[Bergruutfa/Legends|bergruutfas]], grazing creatures over seven meters tall.<ref name="CoG" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Teloc Hunters were created by [[Bill Smith]] for the [[West End Games]] sourcebook ''[[Creatures of the Galaxy]]'', published in [[1994]]. ''Creatures of the Galaxy'' was unique in that the text was built around artists' creature designs, rather than the other way around as was typical.<ref name="Creatures of the Galaxy">''[[Creatures of the Galaxy]]'', 2.</ref> The Teloc Hunters were created as part of the backstory of the bergruutfa, and consequently, were given little description. It is unclear whether the Teloc Hunters are a [[Species/Legends|species]]—there is an unidentified alien riding a berguutfa—or an organization. Therefore, this article treats them as a generic organization.

==Sources==
*<!-- 1994-06-XX -->''[[Creatures of the Galaxy]]''
*<!-- 2010-04-20 -->''[[The Unknown Regions]]''
